articles.title: Dragon Quest 12 Delayed as Team Starts Over
articles.description: Dragon Quest XII: Beyond Dreams faces delays as Square Enix decides to restart development. Fans will have to wait longer for the sequel they've anticipated for nearly a decade.
articles.impact: The delay extends the wait for eager fans.

articles.title: Mina The Hollower Claims Top Metacritic Spot
articles.description: Mina the Hollower has achieved the highest Metacritic score of 2026, surpassing competitors by a significant margin. It stands out in a competitive gaming landscape this year.
key_points: Competing games struggle to catch up
articles.impact: Mina the Hollower sets a high bar for 2026.

articles.title: Nvidia Retires Legacy Control Panel After 20 Years
articles.description: Nvidia has officially retired its Windows XP-era Control Panel, migrating its features to the new Nvidia app. This marks the end of an era for long-time users.
key_points: End of an era for users
articles.impact: Users must adapt to the new Nvidia app.

articles.title: Kojima and Refn Collaborate on AI Short for Prada
articles.description: Hideo Kojima and Nicolas Winding Refn have teamed up for an AI-driven short film for a Prada event. This collaboration explores innovative creative possibilities.
articles.impact: The project showcases AI's creative potential.

articles.title: Roku Launches Major Home Screen Update
articles.description: Roku unveils its first significant home screen update in over a decade, promising a more dynamic and personalized experience for users. The platform continues to grow rapidly.
key_points: First update in over a decade
articles.impact: The update enhances user engagement on Roku.

articles.title: Destiny 2 Community Divided Over Shutdown
articles.description: The impending shutdown of Destiny 2 has split the community, as players react to the end of updates for the long-running game. Many are frustrated with the transition to Marathon.
articles.impact: The shutdown creates significant community unrest.

articles.title: Motorola Fixes Unintended Amazon App Hijacking
articles.description: Motorola has addressed an issue where its phones were hijacking the Amazon app to inject affiliate data. The company confirmed this behavior was unintended and has been resolved.
articles.impact: Motorola's quick response mitigates user concerns.

articles.title: Google Health Faces Fitbit User Backlash
articles.description: Google Health's redesign of the Fitbit app has sparked frustration among users. A new roadmap outlines upcoming bug fixes and improvements in response to the backlash.
articles.impact: Google Health aims to regain user satisfaction.
